sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30678" key="e)dei/dimen" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐδείδῐμεν</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐδᾰ´φ-δῐσαν</orth>, <sense id="n30678.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δείδω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔδεκτο</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δέχομαι</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
